original_title: Supporting Community Independence - Care at Home Framework for Adults - NEW ENTRANTS
english_summary: West Dunbartonshire Council is establishing an open and flexible framework to appoint care providers for delivering Care at Home services to adults. The services include personal care, personal support, and housing support in people's own homes, available 24/7 year-round under Self-Directed Support Options 2 and 3.
what_they_want: Care at Home services including personal care, personal support, and housing support delivered in supported persons' own homes on a 24/7 basis under Self-Directed Support (Scotland) Act 2013 Options 2 and 3
eligibility_requirements: Suitably qualified, experienced and registered Providers (specific certification and registration requirements not detailed in the notice)

buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
english_summary: This tender is for the procurement of swab collection devices and viral transport media (VTM) kits for specimen collection across NHS Scotland's laboratory estate. The procurement includes prefilled VTM tubes, inactivation medium tubes, sterile swabs with breakpoints, and various transport packaging compliant with UN3373 standards for diagnostic specimen transportation.
what_they_want: Sample collection kits with 1ml VTM (tube with green cap + sterile swab with breakpoint); Sample collection kits with 3ml VTM (tube with green cap + sterile swab with breakpoint); Individual tubes with 2ml inactivation medium (red screw cap); Sample collection kits with 2ml inactivation medium (red cap + sterile dry swab with breakpoint); Sterile swabs (flexible polystyrene shaft, viscose/flosynthetic/flocked mini tip, white, PCR ready, CE/UKCA marked); 1 litre bottle inactivation medium (lysis buffer); Replacement blue screw caps; 7ml empty tubes with loose yellow caps; Individual sterile packaged dry swabs without breakpoint; UN3373 compliant transport packs (sealed bags and rigid containers for various tube sizes). All items must be CE or UKCA marked IVD devices.

original_title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply, installation, maintenance, servicing and repair of multi-modality diagnostic imaging and therapy equipment across various medical imaging technologies. It also includes associated consumables, injector systems, and turnkey installation services for NHS Scotland facilities.
what_they_want: Bladder scanners; contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors with syringes and consumables; diagnostic imaging equipment including X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators; mammography vacuum devices; mammography non-wire lesion localisation detectors and devices; sentinel lymph node location detectors and non-radioactive tracer fluids; digital systems for scoliosis; specimen cabinets; Angiography systems; mobile units and modular builds. Services include OEM and 3rd party maintenance, servicing, repair, installation, and turnkey pre-installation works.

english_summary: NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde is procuring one Linear Accelerator to replace aging equipment that has reached end of life at the Beatson Satellite facility located at University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire.
what_they_want: One (1) Linear Accelerator for radiotherapy treatment
